name: Spellcasting
description: As a student of arcane magic, you have learned to cast spells. You know three Wizard cantrips of your choice. Your spellbook starts with six level-1 Wizard spells. Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you can change your list of prepared spells. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability — Spell Save DC = 8 + your INT modifier + your Proficiency Bonus.
